hero.label: Film & Television · Los Angeles
hero.paragraph: The film and television company founded by Michael Seitzman — network drama, documentary, and feature film.

studio.label: The Studio
studio.heading: From network drama to feature film.
studio.body:
Maniac Productions was founded in 2017 by writer-producer Michael Seitzman, alongside former CBS drama head Christina Davis. The company makes scripted and unscripted series for broadcast, cable, and streaming, and has produced feature films and documentary work.

Its current series, *The Rainmaker*, adapts the John Grisham novel for USA Network and was renewed for a second season in 2025.

closing.label: Contact
closing.paragraph: For inquiries regarding film and television projects. Maniac Productions and Michael Seitzman are represented by WME.
